message:
Add ensemble provenance tracker and index tests (84.2% → 86.0%)

20 tests covering ProvenanceTracker (RecordFilter, ListChains,
ListActiveChains, FindByText, RecordTextChange, RecordMerge errors,
RecordSynthesisCitation errors), ProvenanceIndex (New, Index, Lookup,
ByMode, ByContext), FormatProvenance (nil, active, merged, citations),
GenerateReport (nil, populated), Validate (5 cases), truncateText,
AddStep. 12 functions from 0% to 100%.

Ref: bd-u1c5a

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
